creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

phpipam FreeBSD port is currently at 1.2.1. phpipam 1.3 was released on in June of 2017, 1.3.1 in November of 2017. According to project's github page, 1.3.2 should be released soon, and apparently it will be fully php7.2 compatible.

Any chance to update port to 1.3.1?

Thank you in advance.
